g.text: TCP Byte Stream Reality: Boundaries are NOT preserved

div.p: TCP is a stream of bytes, not a stream of packets. Application logic must provide its own framing (e.g., Length-Prefix or Delimiters) to reconstruct message boundaries.

g.text: Result: Works on Localhost, Fails on WAN
